title: Resume & Portfolio Polish
description: Construct game developer portfolios: showcasing gameplay features, structural code, breakdowns, and resume formatting.
learningObjectives: Select and format gameplay features to highlight in breakdown videos
Structure GitHub repositories with clean README files and readable code files
Optimize resume formatting to target studio recruiters

sections.title: Portfolios and Code Showcases
sections.content: A strong portfolio is the single most important asset for getting a game developer job. Recruiters want to see concrete code: clean, structured, and performant. Showcasing technical breakdowns (e.g. explaining the mathematics of a custom pathfinding system or displaying profiling logs of an optimized system) is far more effective than just showing a finished gameplay video.

sections.title: GitHub Repository Structure
sections.content: A high-quality repository should include a clear README with GIFs showcasing gameplay features, detailed architecture diagrams mapping modules, and quick installation links, followed by folders separating clean code from raw assets.
